about.title: A resort where every adventure can rest before the next one.
body: Pokémon Resort is an unofficial, non-commercial fan project about giving the Pokémon from all of your adventures a place to rest, play, and prepare for whatever comes next.

The game is planned around an easy-to-use transfer and storage interface inspired by the DS-era Pokémon games, with support for Pokémon from every generation. Instead of feeling like a box, the resort is meant to feel alive: a warm island where Pokémon can relax, join activities, meet visitors, and become part of a small community.

You play as a concierge. Your job is to care for visiting Pokémon and guests, complete minigames, fulfill special requests, and follow a short main story that introduces the island, its staff, and its systems. Requests unlock items, skills, abilities, room customization, and new ways to personalize the resort.

carousel.caption: A resort-first view of storage: your Pokémon rest, play, and prepare for the next journey.

carousel.caption: Help guests, complete minigames, fulfill requests, and unlock ways to personalize the resort.

carousel.title: Generations connected
carousel.caption: A transfer-and-storage experience inspired by the DS-era flow, designed for every generation.
